reviews.review_description:
Okay.I did this too soon but this game is so fire like I'm A Moderator but it doesn't even matter about that,It matters about the Actual game

Update: game is so fire still owner is so chill back then he gave me mod that's how chill he is
It is different then other games but there is nobody playing I have seen a moderator tho and mod items are really cool and has a ton of cosmetics

It’s not my favorite because, nobody is on there by the time that I get on. And it is very unexpecting. For example, you run into that puma it jump scares you very unexpectedly and makes weird sounds when it does. And also, not very good graphics. Play at your own risk :)
I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH THE OWNER IS SO CHILL. The only thing is that he needs to update the speaking a tiny bit but overall its a really good game!

I thought this game is good and it has unexpected features like cats that jumps are you. This game has great potential, but i am confused about who the scary smily face monke is that if it touches you, ur game crashes.
